summary: Comprehensive synthesis of all revised 14-feature model results from the user's Colab runs. Compares old (16-feature) vs new (14-feature) model performance across training convergence, classification accuracy (96% → 98.7%), AOA coverage (87.48% for 2024, 77.78% for 2025), municipal area statistics, temporal change analysis, and nitrogen savings (45.2% → 19.5%). Includes a complete checklist of updates needed across Chapters 4, 5, and 6.
